stemHtml: An IFR flight encounters radio communication failure in VMC and the PIC considers that he/she will be able to continue to fly in VMC. He/she will…

options.a: land at destination aerodrome unless it is not accessible, and report his/her arrival by the most expeditious means to the appropriate air traffic services unit.
options.b: land at the nearest suitable aerodrome, and report his/her arrival by the most expeditious means to the appropriate rescue coordination centre.
options.c: land at the nearest suitable aerodrome, and report his/her arrival by the most expeditious means to the appropriate air traffic services unit.
options.d: land at destination aerodrome unless it is not accessible, and report his/her arrival by the most expeditious means to the appropriate rescue coordination centre.
